# Promote a learner to a voter.
# First add learner 4, then add it as a voter (AddNode promotes an existing
# learner). It ends up in the voter set and leaves the learner set.

add-nodes id=1 voters=1,2,3
----
INFO 1 switched to configuration voters=(1 2 3)
INFO 1 became follower at term 0

apply-conf-change id=1 changes=l4
----
voters=(1 2 3) learners=(4) auto-leave=false

apply-conf-change id=1 changes=v4
----
voters=(1 2 3 4) learners=() auto-leave=false
